query: SELECT id, ohr_id, full_name, attendance_date, tag, shift, snap_actual_role, snap_planning_group, status, remarks FROM io_attendance WHERE ohr_id = '740044529' AND attendance_date IN ('2026-05-14', '2026-05-15') ORDER BY attendance_date;
